items.title: Snippet Lab + algorithm practice
items.scope: Tagged snippet collections + "compare two snippets" + saved assertions.

items.title: Local AI code assistant
items.scope: Desktop-local Ollama MVP first through `window.lingua.ai.*`; WebGPU, BYO keys, and hosted credits stay later phases under the internal AI bridge ADR.

items.title: Marketing website + docs hub
items.scope: Separate marketing site at linguacode.dev with docs/download/pricing.

items.title: Integrated terminal (desktop)
items.scope: Embed xterm.js + node-pty panel in the desktop build.

items.title: Static site export + publish
items.scope: Export JS/TS/HTML projects as self-contained static ZIP; one-click publish to GitHub Pages.

items.title: Multi-file playgrounds + starter galleries
items.scope: Shipped so far: project tree/search ergonomics, replace-in-files, and project bundle export/import. Remaining: promote `fs:searchInFiles` to ripgrep, finish starter-gallery handoff with RL-103, improve binary-asset export fidelity, and keep total-uncompressed bundle caps honest. Landed details live in the internal plan notes; archive policy/index lives in the internal archive.

items.title: Sharing, collaboration, publish flows
items.scope: Shipped so far: no-backend URL-fragment share links with privacy confirmation, Settings toggle, safe hash boot, and telemetry. Remaining: split clipboard denial vs user-cancel telemetry, Phase A2 `.linguashare` multi-file artifacts after RL-024 project primitives, and backend-gated cloud/embed/collab.

items.title: Debugger MVP
items.scope: Shipped so far: JS/TS breakpoint UI, debugger panel, source-map-aware pauses, run/debug split, stepping controls, telemetry, and docs. Remaining: conditional-breakpoint predicate evaluation and watch-expression evaluation after a security review of worker eval patterns; logpoints remain a later extension.

items.title: Expand languages toward 15+
items.scope: Shipped so far: Ruby web runtime and Ruby desktop native subprocess on the hybrid dispatcher, plus earlier validate-only language packs. Remaining: native execution for Java, Kotlin, Scala, Swift, C, and C++; each promotion is its own slice.

items.title: Notebook / cell-based execution
items.scope: Shipped so far: schema + cell editor + runner-owned sessions + markdown/code cells + run controls + telemetry; cross-cell var sharing (Slice B, TS-AST rewriter + structured-result channel); TypeScript cells (C); Jupyter `.ipynb` export (D); native `.linguanb` export/import + desktop save (E); per-cell Python via Pyodide/native (F, 2026-06-23); and Monaco-backed cells with mount-virtualization (G, 2026-06-24 — the active cell hosts a live Monaco editor, others render a colorized static view so a 200-cell notebook never mounts >1 editor; inline lint + status-bar cursor + Vim parity inside the active cell); and row/scroll list virtualization (Slice H, 2026-06-27 — the cell list windows via the shared useListWindow so a 200-cell notebook mounts only a viewport-sized slice of rows; per-tab scroll persistence, run-into-view, memoized rows). Remaining: reactive dataflow, cross-cell Python (persistent interpreter), shared-globalThis worker.

items.title: Guided lessons + app galleries
items.scope: Shipped so far: guided-tour scaffolds plus Recipes search, 10 JavaScript + 3 TypeScript + 3 Python packs, language-aware Run + Test, persisted progress, reset UI, and telemetry. Remaining: AI hints via RL-031, user-authored recipe import/export through RL-100, lesson progression tree, and `lingua lesson validate`.
